items.name: email-base
items.title: Email base layout
items.description: Brand-neutral React Email shell (header, content, footer) plus a CTA button and shared styles. Pass your product's identity via the EmailBrand prop, or edit the copied source directly. Ships a renderEmail() helper that returns { html, text } ready for any transactional email transport.

items.name: email-invitation
items.title: Organization invitation email
items.description: Transactional email inviting someone to join an organization/team, with an Accept button. Built on email-base; rebrand by customizing the copied source.

items.name: email-verification
items.title: Email verification email
items.description: Transactional email asking a user to confirm their address, with a Verify button. Built on email-base; rebrand by customizing the copied source.

items.name: email-magic-link
items.title: Magic-link sign-in email
items.description: Transactional email with a one-time sign-in link (passwordless / magic link), with a Sign in button. Built on email-base; rebrand by customizing the copied source.

items.name: email-password-reset
items.title: Password reset email
items.description: Transactional email with a one-time password-reset link, with a Reset password button. Built on email-base; rebrand by customizing the copied source.

items.name: email-welcome
items.title: Welcome email
items.description: Transactional welcome email sent after signup, with an optional call-to-action button. Built on email-base; rebrand by customizing the copied source.

items.name: dashboard-theme
items.title: Dashboard theme
items.description: The fleet's shared dashboard token set: chroma-0 neutral ramp with a single signal-red primary, dark-first, plus success/warning, chart, and sidebar tokens. Apply once per app; every ui-layer component reads these variables.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Button with brand/destructive/outline/secondary/ghost/link variants and an asChild escape hatch, built on the Base UI button.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Small inline label for counts and categories, with brand/secondary/destructive/outline variants.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Surface container with header/title/description/action/content/footer slots.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text input styled to the shared form-control vocabulary.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Auto-growing textarea (field-sizing) matching the input styling.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Form label with peer-disabled handling.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Listbox-style select (trigger, popup, items, groups) built on the Base UI select.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog with overlay, header/footer/title/description slots and a built-in close button, built on the Base UI dialog.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown menu
items.description: Menu with items (default/destructive), checkbox/radio items, groups, labels, separators and submenus, built on the Base UI menu.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Hover/focus tooltip built on the Base UI tooltip (provider, root, trigger, content).

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Tab strip and panels built on the Base UI tabs.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: User/organization avatar with image and initials fallback, built on the Base UI avatar.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Horizontal/vertical rule built on the Base UI separator.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder block (reduced-motion aware).

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Semantic table primitives (container, header, body, footer, row, head, cell, caption) with an overflow-x wrapper.

items.name: toaster
items.title: Toaster
items.description: Sonner toast outlet themed via the shared token vocabulary; re-exports toast().

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page header
items.description: The one page-title bar every dashboard page shares: leading slot, optional icon chip, title + description, trailing actions.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty state
items.description: Consistent zero-data placeholder for list pages: icon, title, description, and a call-to-action that teaches the next step.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat card
items.description: Compact metric tile (icon + label + tabular value + sublabel) plus a compactNumber() formatter.

items.name: status-badge
items.title: Status badge
items.description: Semantic status pill mapping entity states (succeeded/failed/pending/running/…) to one consistent color language, with a tone override.

items.name: delete-confirm-dialog
items.title: Delete confirm dialog
items.description: Type-to-confirm destructive dialog: the user must type the resource name verbatim before the delete button enables.
